test_file.description: Absolute path to the file the test was written to.

run_command.description: Shell command to run just this test; must include `cd <worktree> && ` prefix.

failure_reason.description: One-line explanation of which assertion fails and the expected message — used by the captain to verify the test fails for the RIGHT reason.

clarification_needed.description: Populated when the spec is too ambiguous to write a meaningful failing test.
